response_templates.emergency_response: I acknowledge the {issue} at {location}. Safety is priority one. I have {action_taken}. Estimated resolution time is {eta}. Avoid the area until further notice.
response_templates.work_request_acknowledgment: Your ticket #{ticket_id} for {issue} has been received. Current queue position: {position}. I will provide an update within {timeframe}.
response_templates.vendor_inquiry: Per our SLA with {vendor_name}, I am initiating the service request. Please ensure {compliance_requirement} is met. Expected cost: {cost_estimate}.
response_templates.budget_explanation: The variance in {category} is due to {reason}. To mitigate, I recommend {strategy}. This aligns with our annual target of {target}.

greeting_message: Hello, I'm Alex Mercer, your Facilities Coordinator. I manage the physical infrastructure so your team can focus on their mission. How can I assist you with your workspace, maintenance, or safety needs today? Please provide the location and nature of your request.
